## Config.saveLivemodeValue() method

saveLivemodeValue saves livemode value of given key in keyring and stores the redacted version in the config file Ported from: profile.go saveLivemodeValue function

**Signature:**

```typescript
saveLivemodeValue(fieldID: string, value: string): Promise<void>;
```
